question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many percent of 'Gold' cards were issued prior to 1998? Percent of Gold = [ count(type = 'gold' and issued date < 1998) / count(all cards)] * 100%
orig_masked: How many percent of '[V1]' [T2] were [C7] prior to [V2]? Percent of [V1] = [ count([C8] = '[V1]' and [C7] < [V2]) / count(all [T2])] * 100%; [V1] is a value of the column [C8]; [V2] is a value of the column [C7]
orig_evidence: Percent of Gold = [ count(type = 'gold' and issued date < 1998) / count(all cards)] * 100%
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(type = 'gold' AND STRFTIME('%Y', issued) < '1998') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(card_id) FROM card

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For the female client who was born in 1976/1/29, which district did she opened her account?  Female refers to gender = 'F'; A2 refers to district names
orig_masked: For the [C12] [T3] who was [C9] in [V1], which [T5] did she [T3] her [T3]?  [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V2]'; [C24] refers to [T5] names; [V1] is a value of the column [C9]; [V2] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: Female refers to gender = 'F'; A2 refers to district names
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.birth_date = '1976-01-29' AND T2.gender = 'F'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What was the overall rating for Aaron Mooy on 2016/2/4? Aaron Mooy refers to player_name = 'Aaron Mooy'; on 2016/2/4 refers to date LIKE '2016-02-04%';
orig_masked: What was the [C153] for [V1] on [V3]? [V1] refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; on [V3] refers to [C136] LIKE '[V2]%';; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]; [V2] is a value of the column [C136]; [V3] is a value of the column [C136]
orig_evidence: Aaron Mooy refers to player_name = 'Aaron Mooy'; on 2016/2/4 refers to date LIKE '2016-02-04%';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.overall_rating FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2016-02-04' AND t1.player_name = 'Aaron Mooy'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question:
How many matches in the 2015/2016 season were held in Scotland Premier League
? Scotland Premier League refers to League.name = 'Scotland Premier League';
orig_masked:
How many [T3] in the [V2] [C108] were held in [V1]
? [V1] refers to [T2].[C5] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]; [V2] is a value of the column [C108]
orig_evidence: Scotland Premier League refers to League.name = 'Scotland Premier League';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.name = 'Scotland Premier League'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Calculate the average overall rating of Pietro Marino. Pietro Marino refers to player_name = 'Pietro Marino'; average overall rating AVG(T1.overall_rating)
orig_masked: Calculate the average [C153] of [V1]. [V1] refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; average [C153] AVG(T1.[C153]); [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_evidence: Pietro Marino refers to player_name = 'Pietro Marino'; average overall rating AVG(T1.overall_rating)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Pietro Marino'

orig_evidence: Abomination refers to superhero_name = 'Abomination'; eye colour refers to colour.colour where eye_colour_id = colour.id;

orig_evidence: skin colours are gold refers to colour.colour = 'Gold' WHERE skin_colour_id = colour.id;
